To convert the pricing guide to PDF:

Option 1: Browser (Easiest)
1. Open private-jet-pricing-guide.html in Chrome/Safari
2. Press Cmd+P (Print)
3. Select "Save as PDF" as destination
4. Click Save

Option 2: Install WeasyPrint
pip3 install weasyprint
python3 -c "from weasyprint import HTML; HTML('private-jet-pricing-guide.html').write_pdf('private-jet-pricing-guide.pdf')"

Option 3: Online Converter
Use: https://html2pdf.com/ or similar service
